violations.text: The hand-washing sink was blocked by a strainer in the sink basin at the bar. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Strainer was removed from sink basin during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Raw animal foods (such as beef patties) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (such as cooked chicken wings) in the walk-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Raw beef patties were moved to alternate location during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

A knife was stored on an unclean surface (between prep unit and table) between uses. During pauses in food preparation, utensils must be stored on a clean surface or in a clean, protected location. Utensil was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 06/03/2025

Refrigerator door gaskets were observed in poor repair on the 2-door low boy by the salad prep unit. Refrigerator door gaskets shall be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 07/03/2025

Food contact surfaces of equipment/utensils (knife) at Salad Station was observed with an accumulation of food debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Knife was taken to dish area for cleaning and sanitizing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023

Cooked Shrimp was observed held above 50 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be held at 41 degrees Fahrenheit or below except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Establishment voluntarily disposed of shrimp at time of inspection. Temperature of cold hold unit was at 40 degrees. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/16/2023
